Compliance.description: No SA regulatory issues; open-source option; limited native SA BCEA/POPI compliance out-of-box; GDPR tools available but SA-specific setup needed.

Customer Satisfaction.description: G2 3.9/5 (300+ reviews); Capterra 4.2/5 mixed; praised for free tier but cloud billing/support issues.

Product Value.description: Strong free/open-source option; cloud pricing competitive at entry level; limitations on advanced features without custom dev.

Innovation.description: Open-source core with cloud SaaS; API integration; mobile app (3.1/5); AI/analytics roadmap.

Customer Support.description: Email/ticket support for paid; limited free tier support; G2 highlights poor enterprise support.

Accessibility & Security.description: Open-source allows on-premise security; cloud ISO 27001; GDPR tools; decent mobile access. POPIA requires SA custom configuration.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Free open-source; Starter ~$2/emp/mo; Growth ~$3/emp/mo; Professional ~$5/emp/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Open-source community positive; paid support complaints common; good for SMBs starting out.
